letter:
Re: Billing Discrepancy on Invoice megacloud-202508

To the Billing Department, MegaCloud Inc.:

We are writing to dispute a discrepancy identified on invoice megacloud-202508, covering the
billing period 2025-08-01 through 2025-08-31.

Per the governing clause (Amendment 2 §3):

    "Effective January 1, 2025, the per-seat fee set forth in MSA Section 6.2 is amended to $16.50 per active seat per month."

Our records show the contractually correct charge for this period is $181,300.00.
The invoice as billed totals $185,837.50, a discrepancy of $4,537.50.

Calculation:
  - seat usage: expected 181500.00, billed 186037.50 (overcharge of 4537.50)

We request a corrected invoice or credit memo reflecting the $4,537.50 adjustment within
thirty (30) days. Please contact us with any questions.

Regards,
Accounts Payable

finding.clause_quote: Effective January 1, 2025, the per-seat fee set forth in MSA Section 6.2 is amended to $16.50 per active seat per month.
finding.explanation: Invoice total is higher than the contract's Virtual Billing Engine replay by 4537.50.
